title: conformance check-pipeline-blocked goal_autopilot
purpose: G3.3 defines conformance check pipeline blocked goal autopilot for the agent-driven expert system. Verification & quality — evidence, goal_verify, anti-mistake.
scope: Owns `G3.3` only; siblings under `G3` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §9 — Branch G — Verification & quality plane (anti-mistake)](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#9-branch-g-verification-quality-plane-anti-mistake).
behavior_steps: `scripts/headless-verify.py` runs without an IDE session, reading `journal/state.json` and the active task card from disk to delegate verification to `verify-router.py` as an [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) check—no conductor LLM turn unless explicitly configured.
Headless mode mirrors the IDE verifier contract: it executes file-derived test or tool commands from the task card and does not improvise scope beyond what state and cards declare.

On exit 0, evidence logs land under `evidence/` with the same immutability rules as the IDE verifier skill ([H4](H4-evidence.md)), and `last_verify` is set to passed in state.json for the conductor to read on the next wake.

Operators invoke headless-verify locally between IDE sessions, and CI jobs ([I3.2](I3.2-runtime-headless-github-actions-validate-verify.md)) reuse the same entry point so implement batches get verified without consuming a genius-tier orchestration turn.

On non-zero exit, headless-verify sets `last_verify` to failed in state.json; pursuit fail-closes per [G1.3](G1.3-last-verify-before-advance.md) until the conductor or operator reruns verify with green evidence—CI failure alone does not clear H3 or design gates.
edge_cases: Operator closes laptop mid-loop â€” state.json must resume from last good dual-write.
Concurrent manual edit to queue JSON â€” conductor reloads queue each wake; last writer wins with journal note.
Flaky test â€” escalation S4 once, then H2 with evidence log; no silent retry loop.
Edge case `G3.3` variant 4: verify state dual-write before continuing pursuit.
Pass 3: add regression test or evidence path specific to `G3.3`.
Pass 3: cross-link related nodes in same branch index.
failure_modes: **Silent stop:** Agent ends turn without updating queue â†’ mitigated by /loop + check-hierarchy-queue.py EMPTY gate.
**False complete:** Item marked done without artifact â†’ audit-hierarchy-depth.py re-enqueues deepen pass.
**Scope bleed:** Worker edits journal/state during planning-only expansion â†’ forbidden in vision-expansion-prompt.
**Stale design:** Upstream vision Â§ changes â†’ reconcile-stale adds deepen items for affected ids.
implementation: Extend verify-router for goal-level suite invocation.
Wire CI: validate-workflow checks goal block when pursuit.mode=goal_autopilot.
Validate `G3.3` against SEC-15 release checklist and parent index links.
Document `G3.3` in parent index with verify command and release tag.
Add checklist row in SEC-15 release doc for `G3.3`.
acceptance: [ ] Named script, skill, or test path exists or is listed in SEC-15 release row
narrative: G3.3 defines conformance check pipeline blocked goal autopilot for the agent-driven expert system. Verification & quality — evidence, goal_verify, anti-mistake. In practice, the system `scripts/headless-verify.py` runs without an ide session, reading `journal/state.json` and the active task card from disk to delegate verification to `verify-router.py` as an [s0](b1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md) check—no conductor llm turn unless explicitly configured, then headless mode mirrors the ide verifier contract: it executes file-derived test or tool commands from the task card and does not improvise scope beyond what state and cards declare.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-g 2026-06-28 -->

`check-pipeline-blocked.py` with goal_autopilot semantics defines when pursuit must stop: human gates (H1/H2/H3), budget exhaustion, corrupt state, and verify regressions. Autopilot and run-local-pipeline consult this script each iteration instead of inferring stop conditions in chat.

Conformance means autopilot cannot override a would-stop result—gates_pending and blocking_questions remain until explicit operator action. Pair with [A2.6](A2.6-loop-until-blocked-budget-achieved-h3-reject.md) and [A4](A4-index.md) stop taxonomy.
